question.text:

Awaiting your support. Please do the needful to assist with the case below. The agreement did not accept  generating the booking. Kindly check what is wrong, as it is reflecting the following message.

 



 

Thank you.

 

Habon Ali Abdi

answer.text:
Dear Habon,

Please check the route in the agreement: DJJIB -> INMUN, which is not matched with the booking route.



Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆
